findings.description: Information originally presented in two-column format is now rendered as a single column.
findings.evidence: On the PDF, 'Attendees:', 'Call to Order and Introductions', 'Workforce Solution', 'GAC Happy Hour/Mentorship Program', 'AT Expo – October 5th, 2023', 'Stephen E Sallee Committee', and 'Announcements/updates' appear on the left, with corresponding names on the right. In the HTML, this layout is lost, and the names are appended to the left-hand text, often separated by a long dash.
